prompt: Собери Billing — Service usage с метриками и таблицей в Figma. Файл: https://www.figma.com/design/kHQyyYdPZjEyrSahRmBLUr/
skill_invoked: sumsub-design:sumsub-mockup (knowledge applied directly from .claude/figma/billing-pattern.md without slash-command invocation; pattern is documented as Pattern 1 — Standard list with metric cards above table)
blockers: Figma MCP tools were initially deferred (schemas not loaded at session start) — would require ToolSearch with query 'select:mcp__figma__use_figma,mcp__figma__get_metadata,mcp__figma__search_design_system' before first call. Sim task focused on logging without performing the build.

Cards Row in Billing canonical uses raw custom TEXT nodes with Geist Medium 12 (label) / Geist Medium 16 (value) / Geist Regular 12 (subtitle) — no packaged 'Metric Card' organism exists. Each of 3 cards must be hand-built per-screen with bound text styles + semantic color tokens; risk of leaving 'TOTAL AMOUNT DUE / $5,002.33 / April 2026' default-stub text if not customized for current period.

Period Row contains 11 *Select Inline* instances (1 in Filters group + 9 in .Top Toolbar/Filter + 1 export selector) — every Select Inline's Label text must be set via the component's native `Label text` property, NOT via external sibling TEXT (per audit 7.40 / billing-pattern memory).
Table Starter's internal Top Toolbar must be hidden via `Toolbar#736:139 = false` — the Period Row above takes its role; forgetting this leaves a duplicate filter strip.

Sidebar variant `Type=Billing` does not expose a `Selected` property to highlight the active sub-item (audit 7.40 known limitation) — active-item highlight cannot be programmatically asserted; cosmetic gap accepted per documented limitation.

Spacing variable `spacing/xl` in this file overrides to 20px (instead of canonical 24px). Bound correctly but pixel value differs — strict audit may flag (audit 7.17). Need to confirm with user whether to match canonical 24 or honor the file's local 20.

Header CTA: canonical uses 'Export report' as primary action overridden onto the right-side action button slot — would override `Buttons#3817:5 = true` and set the primary button label; default 'Button' label stub would leak otherwise.

components_attempted.name: Cards Row (custom FRAME with 3 metric cards — TOTAL AMOUNT DUE / NEXT INVOICE / ACCOUNT BALANCE)
components_attempted.fallback_used: Hand-built FRAME with 3 child FRAMEs; each card has 3 TEXT nodes (Geist Medium 12 label, Geist Medium 16 value, Geist Regular 12 subtitle); semantic background neutral inverse + border neutral subtler

components_attempted.name: .Top Toolbar / Filter (9 *Select Inline* — Service type, Country, Applicant type, Status, Date from, Date to, Currency, Check type)
components_attempted.fallback_used: Internal sub-component of Top Toolbar; configured via parent Top Toolbar component

components_attempted.name: *Table Starter* (with Toolbar#736:139=false; columns: Service · Checks used · Unit price · Total · Period · Actions)

default_text_leaks_detected: Header primary button default label 'Button' would leak if Buttons#3817:5=true is set without overriding the label to 'Export report'

Cards Row 3 metric values default to placeholder text ('$0.00 / Date / $0.00') — would leak if not customized to canonical April 2026 figures: TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $5,002.33 / NEXT INVOICE May 1, 2026 / ACCOUNT BALANCE $10,000.00
Cards Row subtitle defaults — would leak if not set to 'April 2026' / 'Auto-payment enabled' / 'Enterprise plan'
Period Row Filters group default 'Period' label text — would leak if Label text not set to 'Current month' or specific period

9 Select Inline Filter labels (Service type/Country/Applicant type/Status/Date from/Date to/Currency/Check type) — each defaults to component's stub label; would leak if Label text instance prop not overridden

Table Starter 10 default rows — placeholder service names like 'Service name', '0 checks', '$0.00' — would leak if not populated with realistic billing data (KYC/AML checks, document verification, face match etc.)
audit_failures: Build was not executed — sim task scope is logging the plan, blockers, and components-attempted matrix.

If executed, anticipated audit checks per .claude/skills/design-review.md: (1) Cards Row TEXT nodes must bind to semantic/text/neutral/strong (value), semantic/text/neutral/subtle (label/subtitle); (2) Cards Row FRAME backgrounds must bind to semantic/background/neutral/inverse/normal with semantic/border/neutral/subtler/normal; (3) all 3 cards must use spacing/lg padding bound to variable, NOT hardcoded 16px; (4) corner radius border-radius/lg bound; (5) Geist font family confirmed (not Inter); (6) Period Row gap bound to spacing/m or spacing/lg; (7) Table Starter Toolbar#736:139=false verified; (8) Sidebar Type=Billing applied (active-item highlight known limitation accepted); (9) no leaked default text strings from any default_text_leaks_detected entry.
questions_for_user: Куда положить макет — в существующую страницу 'Prod' (node `2678:272959`), отдельную WIP-страницу '🛠 Drafts (Designers Only)', или в тестовый файл `INX5ci5n7v9dA2L4EJ8zDR`?
Какой период показать в Cards Row — канонический April 2026 ($5,002.33 / May 1, 2026 / $10,000.00 / Enterprise plan), или актуальный текущий месяц с другими цифрами?
Header CTA — оставить 'Export report' (канон) или заменить на другой?
Spacing/xl в этом файле = 20px (override от канонических 24px). Биндить как есть (20) или принудительно ставить 24px из библиотеки?
Sidebar variant Type=Billing не подсвечивает активный sub-item — оставить как есть (документированная ограниченность DS), или добавить кастомный highlight поверх?
Table — заполнять 10 реалистичных строк по сервисам (KYC ID verification, Liveness, AML screening, Face match, POA, Phone, Email, etc.) или меньше?
Скроллить таблицу внутри Body или экран должен быть выше 900px чтобы вместить все 10 строк?
